actions.name: Obstruct

cost.trigger: The user is targeted by an Attack.

actions.description:
Trigger: The user is targeted by an Attack.

Effect: The triggering attack fails to hit the user, and additional attacks also fail to hit until the end of the user's next Activation. Attacks failing to hit this way do not activate their secondary effects. If the triggering Attack has @Trait[contact], the attacker loses -2 DEF Stages for 5 Activations.

Trigger: The user is targeted by a Attack.

Effect: The triggering attack fails, and additional attacks that target the user also fail until the end of the user's next Activation. Attacks failing to hit do not deal damage, activate secondary effects, or activate on-miss effects.

On resolution, the user gains @Affliction[disabled] 5 on this Attack.
